mapper.select: select DATE_FORMAT(t.statistics_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dataTime, IFNULL(t.tableNameEn, '') AS tableNameEn, IFNULL(t.tableAllCount, 0) AS totalCount, IFNULL(t.yesterdayCount, 0) AS incrementCount, IFNULL(t.tableAllSize, 0) AS tableAllSize from ( select TABLE_NAME_EN tableNameEn, round(TABLE_ALL_COUNT / 10000, 2) tableAllCount, round(YESTERDAY_COUNT / 10000, 2) yesterdayCount, round(TABLE_SIZE / (1024 * 1024 * 1024), 2) tableAllSize, date_format(statistics_time, '%Y-%m-%d') statistics_time from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType}) and statistics_time >= date_sub(date(NOW()), interval 8 day) and statistics_time < date_format(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) t right join ( SELECT DATE_ADD( STR_TO_DATE(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 8 DAY, INTERVAL (@rownum := @rownum + 1) - 1 DAY ) AS statistics_time FROM (SELECT @rownum := 0) AS vars, information_schema.tables WHERE @rownum < DATEDIFF( STR_TO_DATE(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d'), STR_TO_DATE(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d') - INTERVAL 8 DAY ) ) d on t.statistics_time = d.statistics_time order by d.statistics_time

select case when table_size = '0' then '0G' when round(table_size / 1073741824, 2) = '0.00' then '0G' else concat(round(table_size / 1073741824, 2), 'G') end as tableAllSize, case when table_all_count = '0' then '0条' when round(table_all_count / 10000, 2) = '0.00' then '0条' else concat(round(table_all_count / 10000, 2), '万条') end as tableAllCount, case when average_daily_volume = '0' then '0条' when round(average_daily_volume / 10000, 2) = '0.00' then '0条' else concat(round(average_daily_volume / 10000, 2), '万条') end as averageDailyCount, case when average_daily_size = '0' then '0G' when round(average_daily_size / 1073741824, 2) = '0.00' then '0G' else concat(round(average_daily_size / 1073741824, 2), 'G') end as averageDailySize from ( select TABLE_TYPE, TABLE_NAME_EN, TABLE_PROJECT, table_size, table_all_count, average_daily_volume, average_daily_size from ( select j.TABLE_TYPE, j.TABLE_NAME_EN, j.TABLE_PROJECT, j.table_size, j.table_all_count, j.average_daily_volume, j.average_daily_size, row_number() over (partition by lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h where h.rnn = 1 ) tt where upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select resourceid from ( select distinct resourceid, row_number() over (order by resourceid) as rn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where upper(table_name_en) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(table_project) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(table_type) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and resourceid is not null ) t where rn = 1

select case when PARTITIONSIZE = '0' then '0' when round(PARTITIONSIZE / 1073741824, 2) = '0.00' then '0' else round(PARTITIONSIZE / 1073741824, 2) end as averageDailySize, case when PARTITIONCOUNT = '0' then '0' when round(PARTITIONCOUNT / 10000, 2) = '0.00' then '0' else round(PARTITIONCOUNT / 10000, 2) end as averageDailyCount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where partitiondate < date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d') and partitiondate > date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 11 day), '%Y%m%d') and TABLETYPE = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEPROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select concat(PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, '->', SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH) as organizationClassifyCh, UPDATE_DATE as updateDate, LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle from ( select j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, case when j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' then j.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH else j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.UPDATE_DATE, j.LIFE_CYCLE, j.TABLE_TYPE, j.TABLE_PROJECT, j.TABLE_NAME_EN, row_number() over (partition by lower(j.TABLE_PROJECT), upper(j.TABLE_NAME_EN) order by j.STATISTICS_TIME desc) as rnn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where j.STATISTICS_TIME >= date(now()) ) h where h.rnn = 1 and upper(h.TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(h.TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(h.TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
